subject: Child figure in orange gi holding a staff, energetic forward stance
description: A small child figure wearing an orange martial arts gi is shown in a dynamic forward-leaning stance. The figure holds a long staff (a pole weapon) in one hand, which extends diagonally across the frame. The hair is dark and spiky. The expression is cheerful and energetic, consistent with youthful enthusiasm rather than grim combat. The background is bright and warm-toned. The combination of orange gi, staff, and child form is highly characteristic of early-arc Goku.
foreground: Child in orange gi holding a long staff, energetic leaning stance
background: Warm bright background, no distinct environment
emotion: cheerful energy, youthful enthusiasm, adventurous readiness
